creator: richardtector@thekeelecentre.com
text:
Current pfqueue port is version 0.5.3.
This update to pfqueue 0.5.6 adds a few useful features and fixes some bugs.

Note the patch in files/ is no longer required. Other than that, the port requires no other changes.

Tested with Postfix 2.3.2

Fix: Apply attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
